case_title: PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION VS. JESSIE NAVARRO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5 BUCKINGHAM WAY, S.F. CA. 94132, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE:$48.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSIE DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSIE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITIONS CORPORATION SERVED JAN-22-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSIE
